description_long: This object is a rectangular, portable radio receiver with a classic design, featuring a prominent telescopic metal antenna extending from the top. The front face displays a large black speaker grille on the right, a vertical frequency indicator window on the left, and several small control switches and buttons. The top surface includes two rotary knobs, likely for tuning and volume control, and the antenna base. The left side has a large circular tuning knob, while the back is mostly plain with some small ports and venting details. The color scheme is primarily a combination of matte gray and black, with a small red accent on the front. The overall build suggests a sturdy plastic housing with metallic and electronic internal components.
description: A rectangular, portable radio receiver with a telescopic antenna, black speaker grille, and a vertical frequency indicator on the front. It features rotary knobs, control switches, and a classic gray and black color scheme.
description_view_0: The left side view shows the large circular tuning knob and the end of the antenna, with minimal other visible features.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the black speaker grille, vertical frequency indicator, control switches, and a small red accent.
description_view_2: The right side view is mostly plain, showing the slim profile of the radio and the antenna extending from the top.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the back panel with venting details, small ports, and the bases of the rotary knobs and antenna.
